name: SpongeBob Shorts Bathroom Mirror Selfie
description: Athletic blonde woman with high braid taking three-quarter rear-view bathroom mirror selfie, olive green compression top and SpongeBob character shorts, looking over shoulder with bright smile, detailed muscular definition
input_prompt: athletic blonde high braid bathroom mirror selfie olive compression top spongebob shorts looking over shoulder smile muscular

subject.description: young athletic woman with mesomorphic build and pronounced hourglass silhouette, taking three-quarter rear-view bathroom mirror selfie, looking over shoulder with bright natural smile

body.physique: high waist-to-hip ratio with narrow, toned waistline
body.details: glutes: significant development of gluteus maximus and medius, firm and rounded; legs: strong muscular quadriceps, well-defined hamstrings and calves; upper_body: broad shoulders relative to waist, V-taper

skin.texture: natural skin texture with visible pores

hair.style: high, tight, single braid hanging down the back

face.expression: bright natural smile with visible teeth
face.details: direction: looking over right shoulder directly at mirror reflection

accessories: modern black smartphone held in right hand
thin gold wedding-style band on ring finger

clothing.details: mock-neck collar with quarter-zip detail; fabric: realistic tension lines and ribbed textures along arms

clothing.pattern: vibrant multicolored SpongeBob SquarePants character collage
clothing.details: colors: yellow, pink, and blue character motifs

pose_action.dynamic_elements: torso: rotated approximately 45 degrees toward mirror; twist: dynamic twist highlighting abdominal-oblique transition and hip curvature; head: looking over right shoulder directly into mirror reflection; phone: held at chest level to capture reflection

background: white walls providing clean minimalist background
neutral-toned shower curtain in blurred background
environment.flooring: weathered grey wood-plank flooring with detailed grain and matte finish

lighting.setup: bright diffused indoor ambient lighting from overhead source
effects: soft shadows accentuating anatomical definition of lower back (lumbar dimples)
separation between glutes and upper thighs

camera_technical.aperture: f/2.8 for sharp subject with soft-focus background

reflection_rules.integrity: mirror reflection must perfectly align with subject's physical orientation and phone placement

the_vibe.aesthetic: professional fitness photography with fun personality
the_vibe.story: post-workout mirror selfie showing off gains

ideogram.prompt: Athletic blonde woman with high braid taking bathroom mirror selfie, bright smile looking over shoulder, olive green compression top with mock-neck and quarter-zip, colorful SpongeBob SquarePants character pattern booty shorts, three-quarter rear-view pose showing athletic build, bright contemporary bathroom with white walls and grey wood floor, diffused overhead lighting

reve.prompt: Fitness photography in the style of athletic mirror selfies, blonde woman high braid looking over shoulder, olive compression top SpongeBob character shorts, three-quarter rear view, contemporary bathroom, bright diffused lighting

grok-imagine.prompt: Athletic blonde woman with high tight braid taking three-quarter rear-view bathroom mirror selfie, bright smile looking over shoulder, olive green compression top with mock-neck and quarter-zip, colorful SpongeBob SquarePants character booty shorts, bright contemporary bathroom with white walls and weathered grey wood floor, diffused overhead lighting

gpt-image-1.5.prompt:
A bright contemporary bathroom with white walls and weathered grey wood-plank flooring.

A young athletic woman with a mesomorphic build takes a three-quarter rear-view mirror selfie. She has blonde hair styled in a high, tight single braid hanging down her back. She looks over her right shoulder with a bright natural smile, showing visible teeth.

She wears an olive green long-sleeved athletic compression shirt with a mock-neck collar and quarter-zip detail, showing realistic fabric tension lines. Her tight-fitting booty shorts feature a vibrant SpongeBob SquarePants character collage pattern in yellow, pink, and blue.

She holds a black smartphone at chest level. Her athletic physique shows defined shoulders, narrow waist, developed glutes, and visible lumbar dimples.

Bright diffused overhead ambient lighting creates soft shadows that accentuate anatomical definition. The image has smartphone photo quality with sharp focus on the mirror reflection.

No logos on background items. No artificial skin smoothing. Realistic texture throughout.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: A young athletic woman with a mesomorphic build and blonde hair in a high tight braid takes a three-quarter rear-view mirror selfie in a bright contemporary bathroom. She looks over her right shoulder with a bright natural smile showing visible teeth, her athletic physique displaying defined shoulders, narrow waist, and developed glutes with visible lumbar dimples. She wears an olive green long-sleeved compression top with mock-neck collar and quarter-zip detail showing realistic tension lines, paired with tight-fitting booty shorts featuring a vibrant SpongeBob SquarePants character collage pattern in yellow, pink, and blue. The bathroom has white walls and weathered grey wood-plank flooring with detailed grain. Bright diffused overhead ambient lighting creates soft shadows accentuating muscle definition. Fitness lifestyle photography, smartphone mirror selfie aesthetic, 35mm lens f/2.8, photorealistic skin texture, not cartoon-like.
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A young athletic woman with a mesomorphic build and blonde hair styled in a high tight braid takes a three-quarter rear-view mirror selfie. She looks over her right shoulder with a bright natural smile, showing defined musculature with narrow waist and developed glutes. She wears an olive green long-sleeved compression top with mock-neck collar and quarter-zip detail, with tight-fitting shorts featuring a vibrant SpongeBob SquarePants character collage pattern in yellow, pink, and blue. Contemporary bathroom setting with white walls and weathered grey wood-plank flooring. Bright diffused ambient lighting from overhead creates soft shadows accentuating lumbar dimples. Fitness lifestyle photography aesthetic, 35mm lens at f/2.8. Realistic skin texture and natural highlights.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the bathroom background to a gym locker room while keeping the woman in the exact same three-quarter rear-view pose, maintaining her blonde braid, bright smile, olive compression top, and SpongeBob shorts. Preserve the same camera angle, body position, and soft lighting quality.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed athletic anatomy (glutes, quads, lumbar dimples), specific clothing (mock-neck, quarter-zip, SpongeBob collage)
2_realism_anchors: 'compression shirt tension lines', 'SpongeBob print detail', 'lumbar dimples', 'wood floor grain', 'braid texture'
4_negative_hygiene: prevents logos, beautify smoothing, extra limbs, distorted reflections
5_spatial_consistency: clear three-quarter rear-view with 45-degree torso rotation
6_lighting_storytelling: 'bright diffused overhead' = confident athletic post-workout mood
7_mirror_rules: explicit reflection alignment with subject orientation
